Body.Content:
Microsoft Purview is introducing the ability to set a limit in days when assigning users and security groups to role groups. This allows admins to define a fixed duration when providing admin permission on a temporary basis.

GA date: July CY2026

Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Admin assignment time limit
